rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0010
rows.name: Yo, how's it going?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0020
rows.name: Terrible, of course. And you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0030
rows.name: Better than you, which means terrific.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0040
rows.name: That's great, you see![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0050
rows.name:
Al-san, you've completely settled
into life here, haven't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0060
rows.name:
The good thing about him is that once you break the
ice like that, he becomes friendly right away.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0080
rows.name: Yo, how's it going?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0090
rows.name: Naturally, terrible, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0100
rows.name: And you, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0110
rows.name: I feel even more terrible than you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0120
rows.name: Al-san, you're breaking the routine, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0130
rows.name:
It's no fun if it's the exact
same every time, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0140
rows.name: That's not fair, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0150
rows.name: Elma[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0160
rows.name: Please silence this annoying thing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0170
rows.name: And? What's the new information?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0180
rows.name: Elma.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0190
rows.name:
I heard the Ares was recreated
on your planet, but[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0195
rows.name:
how much do you actually
understand about this Doll?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0200
rows.name:
Calling it a "recreation" makes it
sound better than it was, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0210
rows.name:
In truth, we took an ultra-ancient frame we
excavated, added auxiliary power and armor to it,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0220
rows.name:
and barely managed to get it
into a functional state.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0230
rows.name:
In other words, we understood absolutely
nothing about the core.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0240
rows.name:
If I had understood it, I would have
explained it when I brought it to Earth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0250
rows.name: I suppose that makes sense[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0260
rows.name: It's frustrating.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0270
rows.name: The Ares core[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0280
rows.name:
It seems they are based on a device that
existed in the ultra-ancient past.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0290
rows.name: A device?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0300
rows.name:
A device that distorts space-time and
transfers targets to another world.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0310
rows.name: The multiverse[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0320
rows.name:
There used to be a lot of stories
like that in old movies, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0330
rows.name: To think it's a reality.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0340
rows.name:
The amount of energy the Ares was generating
via its core was off the charts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0350
rows.name:
According to the simulations,
if brought to maximum output,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0360
rows.name: it could easily distort space-time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0370
rows.name: I see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0380
rows.name: That means...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0390
rows.name:
Void, having obtained the
core, could already[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_JNK0010
rows.name: Pressure

rows.label: xs32160100_SEL0010
rows.name: Urge to deploy and strike immediately.

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0400
rows.name: Calm down, we're still fine.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0410
rows.name: That's right.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0420
rows.name:
The fact that he went out of his way to provoke
us means he's still in the middle of preparing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_JNK0020
rows.name: Allay

rows.label: xs32160100_SEL0020
rows.name: Tell them everything will be fine.

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0430
rows.name: Why is that?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0440
rows.name:
The fact that he went out of his way to provoke
us means he's still in the middle of preparing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0450
rows.name:
Well, even assuming his
preparations are complete,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0455
rows.name: he still can't escape.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0460
rows.name: What do you mean?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0470
rows.name:
He was boasting that as long as he had the
Ares core, he could escape this world,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0480
rows.name:
and if he managed that, he could
even bring the world into concord.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0490
rows.name: However[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0500
rows.name: The core alone isn't enough.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0510
rows.name:
I realized this while
analyzing the Doll, but[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0520
rows.name:
When I was transferred to the rift
between worlds along with the Ares,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0530
rows.name:
its functions and my consciousness
fused together, becoming inseparable.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0540
rows.name: I don't understand the logic behind it, but[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0550
rows.name:
it was probably impossible for a living human to
retain their sense of self in that world otherwise[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0560
rows.name: In other words[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0570
rows.name: Without me and the Ares,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0575
rows.name: the core cannot exert its true power.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0580
rows.name:
Is that what it means to be
inseparable from the Ares?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0590
rows.name:
Not that you can't physically
separate from it[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0600
rows.name:
But a relationship like an
engine and the car body[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0620
rows.name: You catch on fast, Lin.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0630
rows.name: [ST:wide ]―And as the analysis progressed,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0635
rows.name: we discovered something else.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0640
rows.name: While in the rift between worlds,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0650
rows.name:
I saw a place where the torrents
of consciousness converged.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0660
rows.name:
It appears to be a nexus
point of all worlds.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0670
rows.name:
Even if you use the power
of the Ares and the core,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0680
rows.name: if you cannot align with that point,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0685
rows.name: escaping from this world[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0690
rows.name: is probably impossible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0700
rows.name: Meaning we need the exact right timing?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0710
rows.name: Put simply, yes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0720
rows.name: Also,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0730
rows.name:
this is a byproduct of analyzing
the Ares and the rift, but[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0740
rows.name:
That torrent of consciousness
converging at the world's nexus...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0750
rows.name:
Its structure seems to be extremely
similar to that of the Central Life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0760
rows.name: [ST:wide ]―What did you say?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0780
rows.name:
Remember we talked about how Void
projecting his consciousness into the Vita[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0790
rows.name:
was similar to how Earthlings
survive via the [System:Ruby rt=Blue Bloods ]Ｂ．Ｂ．[/System:Ruby]?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0800
rows.name: Even if the Central Life is destroyed[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0810
rows.name:
It means there was a place where
consciousness could be stored.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0820
rows.name: Not through scientific technology,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0830
rows.name:
but as a much grander mechanism
of the world itself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0840
rows.name: I can't believe it[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0850
rows.name:
This mechanism of the world
you're talking about...?[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0860
rows.name: What exactly is it[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0870
rows.name: Who knows[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0880
rows.name:
All I know is, I felt it
when I was in that world.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0890
rows.name: The presence of all of you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0900
rows.name: The presence of people.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0910
rows.name:
It was a mysterious sensation, as if
I was constantly enveloped by "it".[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0920
rows.name: A place where consciousness gathers[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0930
rows.name: The Ares can connect to it[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0940
rows.name: Or rather, perhaps "soul"[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0950
rows.name: Who knows.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0960
rows.name: Well, if we manage to escape this world,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0970
rows.name: I suppose we'll find out eventually.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0980
rows.name: In any case[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0990
rows.name: The six cores stolen by Void.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG0995
rows.name: The Ares and myself[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG1000
rows.name:
And the timing to align
with the nexus of worlds[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG1010
rows.name:
Unless all these elements are
aligned, escape is impossible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG1020
rows.name: This fact[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG1030
rows.name:
Void should be realizing it
right about now as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG1040
rows.name: But if that's the case[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG1050
rows.name: Why doesn't he attack NLA?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG1060
rows.name:
He's afraid that doing so
might end up killing Al,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG1070
rows.name: or destroying the Ares.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG1080
rows.name: However[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG1090
rows.name:
Eventually, he'll likely devise a
plan and intervene in some way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG1100
rows.name: Then[ST:wide ]― what do we do?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG1120
rows.name: What's your opinion on the matter?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG1130
rows.name: I'm expecting an electrifying answer.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_JNK0030
rows.name: Preemptive

rows.label: xs32160100_SEL0030
rows.name:
Show a fighting stance, declaring
we strike before they do.[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG1140
rows.name: [ST:wide ]―Exactly as expected.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG1150
rows.name: You really are similar[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG1160
rows.name: to me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_JNK0040
rows.name: Confidence

rows.label: xs32160100_SEL0040
rows.name:
Show confidence, telling him you'll
have it done before he wakes up.[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG1170
rows.name: Ahahahaha[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG1180
rows.name: Electrifying![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32160100_MSG1190
rows.name: That's an answer beyond my expectations.[ST:wait ]
